commit.subject: LU-17711 tests: add test for '..' after rename
commit.message:
LU-17711 tests: add test for '..' after rename

Verify that the ".." entry was updated properly after restore,
including with an htree split directory with dx_root entry.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=131 serverdistro=el8.9
Test-Parameters: testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=131 serverdistro=el9.3
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I33e862739fa44f583aaa4369190d6d80273ebbe5
